name: David Chadwick
bio: David Chadwick serves as the Mayor of Center, the county seat of Shelby County. Center is known for its poultry industry and the annual What-A-Melon Festival. The mayor presides over city council meetings and works to support economic development in this deep East Texas community.
campaignPromises: Support the poultry and agriculture industries
Improve city roads and water systems
Promote economic diversification and new businesses
Enhance community events and recreational facilities
